target: Testmaster - Nano Banana 2 AI images + ElevenLabs TTS audio verification
summary: ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. Backend: 24/24 pytest tests passed. Frontend: AI-generated vocabulary images display correctly (cute bear image visible in screenshot), speaker buttons present for audio playback, listening activity has Play Audio button. Static file serving working (200 OK for both images and audio).

issues: When clicking Skills roadmap step, shows 'This activity module is coming soon' - but clicking Listening in sidebar works correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified AI media integration: Nano Banana 2 AI images (148/243 words) display in vocabulary cards, ElevenLabs TTS audio (478 files) plays via speaker buttons. Static file serving at /api/static/vocab_images/ and /api/static/audio/ returns 200. Frontend correctly constructs full URLs by prepending API_URL/api to relative paths. Vocabulary module shows AI image (cute bear for 'hello'), speaker button triggers audio playback. Listening activity has Play Audio button that uses audio_url.
